SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Randal Hufnagel, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF appears in Propria Persona.
Mike Cinquini, APPELLANT/DEFENDANT appears in Propria Persona.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both parties are sworn and testified on their own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced by plaintiff and retained.
Binder -compilation of documents and photographs.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Matter is taken under submission.

JPT Elliot Myles, Clerk: B. Paredes, matter not reported (D525)
